title: ACK
description: Payload for message_type=ACK. Sent when a receiver accepts a message and wants to confirm receipt without sending a substantive response. Used by Concierge when Commissioner's question is already answered in GoalSpec — Concierge replies ACK + reference rather than re-asking the user.

acknowledged_message_id.description: The message_id of the message being acknowledged.

acknowledged_message_type.description: The message_type of the acknowledged message.

reference.description: Optional: if the ACK is in response to a NeedsRequirements, this points to where in GoalSpec the question is already answered (e.g. 'GoalSpec.constraints.offline_after_install = true').
